Class PostOffice

java.lang.Object
com.amazingco.PickingPoint
com.amazingco.PostOffice
All Implemented Interfaces:
IdentificationRegistry
public class PostOffice extends PickingPoint implements IdentificationRegistry
Post office pickup point for Amazingco systems. PostOffice accepts certified deliveries and implements IdentificationRegistry. It is conceptually unlimited in capacity and always reports available space. It accumulates cash-on-delivery collections similarly to Kiosk and provides a method to reset the collected amount when paid to AmazingCo.

  • Constructor Details

    • PostOffice

      public PostOffice(String identifier, es.uva.inf.poo.maps.GPSCoordinate coordinates, LocalTime openingTime)
      Constructs a PostOffice with the given identifier, coordinates and opening time.
      Parameters:
      identifier - String representing the PostOffice identifier
      coordinates - GPSCoordinate representing the PostOffice location
      openingTime - LocalTime representing the PostOffice opening time

  • Method Details

    • isPackagePickupRegistered

      public boolean isPackagePickupRegistered(String packageCode)
      Returns whether a pickup has been registered for the given package code.
      Specified by:
      isPackagePickupRegistered in interface IdentificationRegistry
      Parameters:
      packageCode - String package code
      Returns:
      true when a pickup record for packageCode exists, false otherwise
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if packageCode is null

    • getPackageRegistered

      public Package getPackageRegistered(String packageCode)
      Returns the registered package matching the provided package code.
      Specified by:
      getPackageRegistered in interface IdentificationRegistry
      Parameters:
      packageCode - String package code
      Returns:
      non-null registered Package
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if packageCode is null or no matching registered package exists

    • getRegisteredIdFor

      public String getRegisteredIdFor(String packageCode)
      Returns the registered identifier (first authorized ID) for the given package code.
      Specified by:
      getRegisteredIdFor in interface IdentificationRegistry
      Parameters:
      packageCode - String package code
      Returns:
      a valid ID (non-null)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if packageCode is null or no matching registered package exists

    • getPickupDateFor

      public LocalDate getPickupDateFor(String packageCode)
      Returns the stored pickup date for the registered package matching the provided package code.
      Specified by:
      getPickupDateFor in interface IdentificationRegistry
      Parameters:
      packageCode - String package code
      Returns:
      non-null pickup LocalDate
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if no registered package matches the code

    • registerCertifiedPackagePickup

      public void registerCertifiedPackagePickup(Package p, String dni, LocalDate pickupDate)
      Registers the pickup of a certified package at this PostOffice.
      Specified by:
      registerCertifiedPackagePickup in interface IdentificationRegistry
      Parameters:
      p - Package to register
      dni - String identifier provided for pickup
      pickupDate - LocalDate of pickup
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the post office is not operative, the package is null, dni is null, pickup date is null, or the pickup date is invalid

    • addPackage

      public void addPackage(Package pkg, LocalDate deadline)
      Adds a certified package to this PostOffice with the given storage deadline.
      Parameters:
      pkg - Package to add
      deadline - LocalDate representing storage deadline
